name: Brass Rifle
description: Long rifle with brass receiver, walnut stock, and steam-era detailing.

textToImageTask.prompt: Long steampunk rifle, brass receiver, walnut stock, steam-era detailing, clean background, multi-view sheet

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Steampunk long rifle prop, brass receiver, walnut stock, detailed barrel
